context: You are checking into a hotel in Seoul. The receptionist greets you at the front desk.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 안녕하세요! 저희 호텔에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say hello and that you have a reservation

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Yes! Under what name did you make the reservation?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask how much the room costs per night

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 싱글룸은 1박에 십만 원입니다. 조식이 포함되어 있습니다.
exchanges.translation: A single room is one hundred thousand won per night. Breakfast is included.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 네, 호텔 전체에서 무료 와이파이를 사용하실 수 있습니다. 여기 열쇠입니다. 305호실입니다.
exchanges.translation: Yes, free Wi-Fi is available throughout the hotel. Here is your key. It is room 305.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 체크아웃은 낮 열두 시까지입니다. 편안한 숙박 되시길 바랍니다!
exchanges.translation: Check-out is by twelve noon. I hope you have a comfortable stay!
